# CMPLX Standards Catalog

## Standard Checks (per paper)

| Standard ID | Description | Applies To |
|-------------|-------------|------------|
| paper.claim_coverage | All claims covered by receipts or open obligations | paper-01..40 |
| paper.obligation_continuity | All open obligations have candidate corpus continuations | paper-01..40 |
| paper.open_obligations_disclosed | Open obligations disclosed when results incomplete | paper-01..40 |
| paper.receipt_status | All receipts parseable and report allowed statuses | paper-01..40 |
| paper.structure | Paper has required sections and claims are exposed | paper-01..40 |
| paper.suite_aware_evidence | Local open/failing items have passing corpus continuations | paper-01..40 |
